title: AnDe's Optimized
description: An optimization and QOL mopack not trying to break the vanilla experience.
body:
This is a simple modpack meant mostly for personal use, and use among players of the Grind Time SMP. Based on [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized), just adds a few more things for QOL.

The modpack's settings are mostly default out of the box. Change things as you wish. My preferred shader pack is [Complementary Reimagined](https://www.complementary.dev/reimagined/) (but not included by default), and an interface for getting Vanilla Tweaks texture packs in game is available in the resource packs menu.

You may also want to install Farsight from Curseforge, which I also cannot include for licensing reasons.

***This is a rolling release modpack, somewhat variating from the releases of upstream Fabulously Optimized. Expect frequent updates, and occasional breakage.***
